prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical smartphone snapshot at a lively Japanese summer festival at night, taken with a wide-angle phone flash from slightly above eye level. In the foreground, show exactly two young Japanese women with blonde hair crouching together on gray asphalt and looking directly into the camera. The woman on the left wears a dark navy yukata with pale floral patterns, beige geta sandals, a red obi visible behind her, and an ornate side hair ornament with white flowers, red accents, gold beads, and tassels; her hair is in a soft messy updo with bangs, she smiles warmly, holds a blue glass ramune bottle in one hand, and makes a peace sign with the other. The woman on the right wears a white yukata with large red flower and gray leaf patterns, a yellow obi with a black bow visible at the side/back, and black sandals; her hair is in two loose braids with wispy bangs, she has glossy gyaru-style makeup and big eyes, and she holds a white bowl of bright red shaved ice with a small white spoon. Make the background a busy matsuri street lined with illuminated food and game stalls, red-and-white striped booth curtains, hanging lanterns, warm string lights, festival-goers in yukata, a goldfish-scooping style stall on the left, candied-apple or snack display on the right, and a white cooler near the right edge. Use strong on-camera flash on the subjects, warm lantern bokeh in the distance, realistic skin texture, natural casual posing, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, high detail, candid social-media photo aesthetic. No text overlay, no watermark, no extra foreground people, no distorted hands, no duplicated bowls or bottles.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical smartphone snapshot at a lively Japanese summer festival at night, taken with a wide-angle phone flash from slightly above eye level. In the foreground, show exactly two young Japanese women with blonde hair crouching together on gray asphalt and looking directly into the camera. The woman on the left wears a dark navy yukata with pale floral patterns, beige geta sandals, a red obi visible behind her, and an ornate side hair ornament with white flowers, red accents, gold beads, and tassels; her hair is in a soft messy updo with bangs, she smiles warmly, holds a blue glass ramune bottle in one hand, and makes a peace sign with the other. The woman on the right wears a white yukata with large red flower and gray leaf patterns, a yellow obi with a black bow visible at the side/back, and black sandals; her hair is in two loose braids with wispy bangs, she has glossy gyaru-style makeup and big eyes, and she holds a white bowl of bright red shaved ice with a small white spoon. Make the background a busy matsuri street lined with illuminated food and game stalls, red-and-white striped booth curtains, hanging lanterns, warm string lights, festival-goers in yukata, a goldfish-scooping style stall on the left, candied-apple or snack display on the right, and a white cooler near the right edge. Use strong on-camera flash on the subjects, warm lantern bokeh in the distance, realistic skin texture, natural casual posing, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, high detail, candid social-media photo aesthetic. No text overlay, no watermark, no extra foreground people, no distorted hands, no duplicated bowls or bottles.
promptZh: 创作一张写实的竖屏智能手机快照，场景设定在热闹的日本夏季夜晚祭典，采用广角手机闪光灯，拍摄视角略高于视线。在前景中，展示两名金发年轻女性（blonde），她们蹲在灰色柏油路上，直视镜头。左侧女性身穿深蓝色浴衣，带有淡雅花卉图案，脚穿米色木屐，背后可见红色腰带，发间别着精致的侧边发饰，饰有白花、红色点缀、金色珠子和流苏；她留着蓬松凌乱的盘发和刘海，笑容温暖，一手拿着蓝色玻璃瓶装的弹珠汽水，另一只手比出剪刀手。右侧女性身穿白色浴衣，带有大型红色花朵和灰色叶片图案，黄色腰带侧后方系着黑色蝴蝶结，脚穿黑色凉鞋；她梳着两条松散的麻花辫，留着轻薄刘海，化着亮面辣妹风妆容，双眼明亮，手中拿着一碗 鲜红色的刨冰，配有一把白色小勺。背景设定为繁忙的祭典街道，两旁排列着灯火通明的食物和游戏摊位，挂着红白相间的摊位布帘、悬挂的灯笼、温暖的串灯，以及身穿浴衣的游客；左侧是一个捞金鱼风格的摊位，右侧是糖苹果或零食展示区，右边缘附近有一个白色冷藏箱。对主体使用强烈的机顶闪光灯，远处呈现温暖的灯笼虚化效果，皮肤纹理真实，姿态自然随意，景深适中，细节丰富，呈现社交媒体抓拍的美感。无文字叠加，无水印，前景无多余人物，无扭曲的手部，无重复的碗或瓶子。
